g.text: 3 sponsors helped mjun0812 in the past
About Me
Hi! I'm Junya Morioka (@mjun0812), a Machine Learning Engineer in
Tokyo with a Ph.D. in Computer Science.
I build and maintain open-source tools for ML/AI developers, especially
around CUDA, PyTorch, GitHub Actions, and modern Python
development environments.
My main project is
, which provides
pre-built Flash Attention 2 and 3 wheels for Linux and Windows. It uses
GitHub Actions, self-hosted runners, and AWS CodeBuild to support
many CUDA / PyTorch / Python / platform combinations that are not
always available officially.
I also maintain
and Python project templates, and I have
contributed fixes to OSS projects such as Hugging Face Accelerate /
Datasets, YOLOv5, PyTorch, oxc, mirrors-oxfmt, and azooKey Desktop.
Sponsorship helps me keep maintaining build infrastructure, release
automation, documentation, and user support. If my projects have saved
you time or compute resources, I would really appreciate your support.
